title: Written In The Nouveaux Interests Des Princes De L'Europe
content:
Bless'd be the princes who have fought
For pompous names or wide dominion,
Since by their error we are taught
That happiness is but opinion.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Matthew Prior delivers a powerful performance in "Written In The Nouveaux Interests Des Princes De L'Europe"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
